prestazioni: VK45DE (4.5L V8) engine swap with HKS GT-SS turbo kit (GT2835 ball-bearing turbo, HKS 264°/264° camshafts, and HKS Hi-Power exhaust manifold) for 550whp on 98 RON fuel with AEM Infinity 8 standalone ECU
JUN Auto 8500rpm forged internals (JUN billet crankshaft, JUN H-beam connecting rods, and CP pistons with 11.5:1 compression ratio) paired with Tomei Type-S 1.5mm head gasket and ARP head studs
HKS Hi-Power intercooler with custom 3.5-inch aluminum piping, HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve, and Nismo S-Tune 75mm throttle body for optimized airflow to the VK45DE
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody kit (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and custom carbon fiber overfenders) with custom 3M Matte Pearl White wrap and Veilside GT-Wing
Work Meister S1 3P 19x10.5 +25 front and 19x12 +30 rear wheels with Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R 265/30/19 and 295/30/19 tires, paired with Nismo 4-piston front and 2-piston rear big brake kit
Custom carbon fiber front splitter by Rocket Bunny (Y10-specific design) with integrated canards, and a custom rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon for the Cima’s unique rear bumper profile
